fixed: Remove the release version from the download URL
Use enableReleaseAssets instead of setBranch for updater

changed: Changed plugin name from egas to egas-data-sync-for-sage

added: Can configure the plugin to connect to the Sage API
Synchronize articles from WordPress to Sage and from Sage to WordPress
Synchronize clients from WordPress to Sage and from Sage to WordPress
Synchronize sales documents from WordPress to Sage and from Sage to WordPress
Can select the journal in which payments are stored
Can select the payment terms type
Synchronize payments from WordPress to Sage and from Sage to WordPress
Can choose whether an advance payment document is created for advance payment documents
